meaning: n.<英>供最后挑选(或考虑)用的候选人名单
examples: She is on my shortlist of great singers.
We have to choose a new manager from a shortlist of five candidates.
If you've been asked for an interview you are probably on a shortlist of no more than six.
That shortlist is completed by The Girl's Toby Jones for his portrayal of Alfred Hitchcock.
Mr Brown made the funding announcement as he unveiled the shortlist of bidders for the contract.
